summary.headline: Site live on buildt.ie, first managed cycle underway.
summary.note: BUILDT launched at the end of June on Cloudflare. The one-time build is complete and paid in full. The managed plan begins billing on 1 August; a baseline security audit is scheduled for the week before. Full record below.

delivery.title: Deployed to Cloudflare Pages
delivery.detail: Site went live on buildt.ie, built on Cloudflare Pages with an automated GitHub Actions deploy.

delivery.title: Admin panel and launch list
delivery.detail: Password-gated admin panel, plus a launch-list signup that persists to a Cloudflare D1 waitlist.

delivery.title: Monitoring and access gate
delivery.detail: Sentry error monitoring, a health probe, and access gating so the full site could be previewed before launch.

delivery.title: PC configurator
delivery.detail: Configurator rebuilt around a Value default with live price deltas and twelve case and lighting renders.

delivery.title: Homepage and build flow
delivery.detail: Section structure locked and the build-your-own entry point shipped.

delivery.title: Project kickoff
delivery.detail: Custom Svelte build scaffolded and the brand emblem and identity set.

incidents.title: Pre-launch gate briefly open
incidents.impact: buildt.ie was publicly reachable for a short window. The admin stayed protected.
incidents.detail: A deploy reset the production configuration and dropped the coming-soon flag. Restored in the same session. The waitlist and all data were unaffected.

notes: Baseline security audit is scheduled for the week before the managed plan begins on 1 August. Findings will be reported here once it has run.

performance.title: Baseline performance check
performance.detail: Captured in the first monitoring cycle, before the managed plan begins. Figures reported here once measured.

nextUp.title: Mobile layout pass: resolve horizontal scroll
